texto: There is no feeling like the one you get after you complete a goal,no matter how menial even one such as cleaning your home. You take a step back, look around and at that moment you feel true happiness.Don't let that person inside of you laze around and escape reality no matter how tempting they can be.They are the true devil, standing by doing nothing as the world passes you when you could have made a difference, no matter how small.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Michael Mano: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “There is no feeling like the one you get after you complete a goal,no matter how menial even one …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, accomplishment, depression pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e depression.

frase_original: There is no feeling like the one you get after you complete a goal,no matter how menial even one such as cleaning your home. You take a step back, look around and at that moment you feel true happiness.Don't let that person inside of you laze around and escape reality no matter how tempting they can be.They are the true devil, standing by doing nothing as the world passes you when you could have made a difference, no matter how small.

texto: I ask myself every day am I an Adult?What is an Adult? To me an Adult is someone who can see the world for what it really is.And instead of giving up and trying to escape reality at every moment they can, they choose to continue on and use what is around them to help them succeed.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Michael Mano que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “I ask myself every day am I an Adult?What is an Adult? To me an Adult is someone who can see the …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, depression, inspiracional, com foco em inspiracao e inspiracional.
